title: New Shears
description: This Minecraft mod introduces wooden shears, giving players an easier way to craft shears early in the game. It speeds up the process of gathering wool, leaves, and other materials, helping players progress faster during the early stages of survival.
body:
# 🛠️ MOD "New Shears" - Fast and Efficient Gathering at Your Fingertips! 🛠️


Looking to speed up your early-game resource gathering? With the New Shears mod, you can craft shears right from the start, using simple wooden materials for a smoother survival experience.



**🌲 Gather Resources Quickly 🌲**
This mod introduces wooden shears, allowing you to collect wool, leaves, and other valuable resources faster than ever. Perfect for players who want to progress quickly without the need for more advanced materials early on.



**🔧 Enhance Early-Game Efficiency 🔧**
No more waiting to craft iron shears! Wooden shears are easy to make and highly useful, helping you streamline the gathering process during those critical first moments of survival. Perfect for speedrunners or casual players alike!



**📦 Simple Installation & Full Compatibility 📦**
Wooden Shears is easy to install and fully compatible with the latest game versions. Download now and jumpstart your Minecraft adventure with efficient resource collection!
